name: DiffusionGemma
metaDescription: DiffusionGemma (Google), released 2026-06-10 — part of the Gemini Diffusion / DiffusionGemma line. First open-weight (Apache 2.0) text-diffusion model; 26B MoE…
overview: DiffusionGemma is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Diffusion / DiffusionGemma line. Released 2026-06-10. Experimental text-diffusion line that generates text by denoising blocks in parallel for much higher throughput.
What's notable in this version: First open-weight (Apache 2.0) text-diffusion model; 26B MoE (~3.8B active), up to 4x faster generation; experimental, lower quality than Gemma 4.
